sources.page_title: Menzerna Orbital Wool Pad — Polished Bliss
sources.cleaned_content:
# Menzerna Orbital Wool Pad

by Menzerna

Price: £9.00

Sizes available: 75mm - £9.00 | 125mm - £14.00

Availability: 63 in stock, ready to be shipped

## We Say

Designed for use with DA polishers, the Menzerna Orbital Wool Pads are a game-changer in how fast you can cut through oxidation and heavy defects on tougher paint systems compared to more traditional foam (even Microfibre!) pads.

The wool feels great quality and resists clogging during use meaning the finish stays consistent throughout the process, and the pads leave a nice clear finish that is ready for the next stage.

## Key Features

Cut Level: 10/10 (Compared To Others)
Flexibility: 8/10 (Compared To Others)
Washable: Yes (By Hand)

## Description

Menzerna Orbital Wool Pad - High Performance Cutting Pad for Dual Action Polishers

The Menzerna Orbital Wool Pad is a professional-grade polishing pad designed for fast and effective paint correction using dual action polishers. Made with a premium blend of natural wool fibers, this pad delivers powerful cutting performance to remove swirl marks, oxidation, scratches, and sanding haze from all types of automotive paint. It is ideal for the first step of a multi-stage paint correction process.

Designed specifically for use with orbital or dual action machines, the Menzerna Orbital Wool Pad maintains excellent control and user comfort while maximizing defect removal. Its short wool fibers allow for efficient heat management and minimal product sling, making it cleaner and safer to use compared to traditional wool pads. The pad provides strong cut while finishing down better than expected for a heavy cutting pad, reducing the need for excessive follow-up polishing.

This wool pad works best when paired with Menzerna heavy cut compounds such as Heavy Cut Compound 400 or Cut Force Pro, and it is perfect for detailing professionals and enthusiasts seeking reliable, consistent results on modern clear coats or harder paint finishes.

Key features:
- Premium wool blend for high cutting power
- Designed for use with dual action polishers
- Removes oxidation, scratches, and sanding marks
- Low heat build-up for safer polishing
- Minimizes dust and product sling
- Hook and loop backing for secure fit and easy pad changes

The Menzerna Orbital Wool Pad is the ideal solution for aggressive paint correction using a dual action polisher. Whether working on heavy defects or prepping a vehicle for further refinement, this pad delivers fast, efficient results with a smooth user experience.

## Specification

Compatible Backing Plate: 75mm and 125mm
Construction: Wool and flexible polyurethane foam
Cut Level: 10/10
Flexibility: 8
Suitable For Hard Paints: Yes
Suitable For Intermediate Paints: Yes
Suitable For Soft Paints: Yes
Washable: Yes (By Hand)

## How To Use

General usage notes: (i) always select the least aggressive pad you think you will need to achieve the desired result, and step up one grade at a time if more cut is required (ii) always ensure that you centre each pad properly on the backing plate (this can take several attempts to get right, but is vital if the machine is to remain perfectly balanced during use); (iii) always use an appropriate sized pad for the backing plate you are using (the pad should always protrude past the edge of the backing plate, never the other way around); (iv) always prime a new pad by spreading a thin layer of product over it using a RUPES BigFoot Claw Pad Tool and running it stationary on the paint for 15 seconds at low speed; (v) always ensure that spent polish residue on the face of the pad is cleaned off regularly during use using either a compressed air gun or a RUPES BigFoot Claw Pad Tool (failure to follow this advice can lead to micromarring of the finish, so don't be lazy!); (vi) after use, soak each pad in a bucket of PB Snappy Clean Boost solution for 15 minutes and then rinse under fresh running water (using your fingertips to massage out any remaining polish residue) and allow to dry naturally, and; (vii) while not in use, store in a dry, dust-free environment (lidded plastic storage boxes are ideal in this respect).

## Description

The Menzerna Orbital Wool Pads removes fast scratches, sanding marks and surface defects in combination with Menzerna Heavy Cut polishes. The Premium Orbital Wool Pads are high-quality abrasive wool pads with a foam interface. The short-haired wool is especially suitable for scratch removal with orbital buffing machines.

# Menzerna Orbital Wool Pad – 140mm / 5.5" – High-Performance Polishing Pad for Dual Action & Random Orbital Polishers

Price: $19.99

Sizes available: 3.5" - $19.99 | 5.5" - $22.99

## Description

The Menzerna Orbital Wool Pad is a professional-grade polishing pad designed to deliver exceptional cutting performance on automotive paint surfaces. Made from premium natural wool, it effectively removes heavy oxidation, scratches, and swirl marks while maintaining low heat build-up for safe polishing. Measuring 140mm / 5.5", this pad is perfectly suited for dual action and random orbital polishers, offering both professional detailers and enthusiasts a reliable solution for achieving flawless paint correction.

Versatile Size – 140mm / 5.5" pad fits most standard backing plates for professional and DIY detailing applications.
